subcodes.first_line: O Pen of the Most High! Write Thou upon the shining page that which the Divine Lote-Tree calleth unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی ان اکتب علی الورقه البیضاء ما تنادیک به سدره المنتهی علی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @call to action
